creator: ardovm@yahoo.it
text:
The error is here:

/wrkdirs/usr/ports/editors/openoffice-4/work/aoo-4.1.15/main/unoxml/source/xpath/xpathapi.cxx:386:27: error: assigning to 'xmlStructuredErrorFunc' (aka 'void (*)(void *, const _xmlError *)') from incompatible type 'void (void *, xmlErrorPtr)' (aka 'void (void *, _xmlError *)'): type mismatch at 2nd parameter ('const xmlError *' (aka 'const _xmlError *') vs 'xmlErrorPtr' (aka '_xmlError *'))

We seem to need some "const" indications. We will probably have to fix this upstream as well.
